headlines: Senate schedules April markup for the CLARITY Act as stablecoin yield deal advances
Senators Lummis and Cassidy introduce the 'Mined in America Act' to boost U.S. crypto mining
Crypto market pullback today — Bitcoin and ETH slip amid risk-off flows
US spot Bitcoin ETFs recorded ~$69M inflows on March 30 (continued ETF activity)
Tether hires KPMG for a full audit as stablecoin sector institutionalizes (GSR weekly note)

articles.title: Senate schedules April markup for the CLARITY Act
articles.summary: U.S. lawmakers have set an April markup for the Digital Asset Market CLARITY Act, moving the bill closer to committee debate after negotiators reached a tentative stablecoin-yield compromise. The markup is the next key step toward a federal framework for crypto classification and stablecoin rules.

articles.title: ‘Mined in America Act’ introduced to boost U.S. mining and codify Bitcoin reserve
articles.summary: Senators Cynthia Lummis and Bill Cassidy introduced the Mined in America Act to encourage U.S. cryptocurrency mining, certify American-made mining equipment, and help codify the administration’s Strategic Bitcoin Reserve plan.

articles.title: Crypto market pulls back today — Bitcoin and Ethereum fall
articles.summary: Risk-off flows pushed crypto markets lower in the last 24 hours: Bitcoin slid into the mid–$60k range and Ether dipped near $2k as traders reduced exposure and ETF flows turned mixed.

articles.title: Spot Bitcoin ETFs logged roughly $69M of inflows on March 30
articles.summary: U.S. spot Bitcoin ETFs continued to attract retail and institutional money, with data showing about $69.4 million of net inflows on March 30 — a sign that ETFs remain a major on-ramp for institutional BTC demand.
articles.source: CoinGape (SoSoValue data) / Cointelegraph ETF flow reporting

articles.title: Tether hires KPMG for full audit as stablecoins keep growing
articles.summary: Tether engaged a Big Four auditor (KPMG) for a comprehensive audit of USDT reserves, a move seen as part of wider institutionalisation of stablecoins after recent U.S. rule changes and industry shifts.

articles.title: Ethereum Foundation posts record $46.2M ETH staking deposit
articles.summary: The Ethereum Foundation recorded a large ETH staking deposit ($46.2M), highlighting renewed staking activity and institutional interest in securing the network and earning staking yields.

articles.title: Upbit listing lifts Sky Protocol (SKY) — token jumps after listing news
articles.summary: Tier-1 exchange Upbit announced listings for Sky Protocol (SKY) and USDS, opening the token to Korea's large retail base and driving an immediate price and volume spike.

articles.title: Ripple Prime integrates commodity perps on Hyperliquid (HIP-3)
articles.summary: Ripple Prime expanded its Hyperliquid integration to add gold, silver and oil perpetuals via HIP-3, letting institutional clients trade on-chain commodity derivatives alongside crypto positions.
